title: Implement Stoat client plugin
description: Incrementally implement the Stoat (Revolt) client as an isolated WASM component plugin, following project plans, client-plugin WIT boundary rules, and per-crate agents.md guidance. Work in small resumable steps with memories/findings recorded throughout.

checklist.text: Implement Stoat auth transport models and login flow
Add Stoat auth spec and feature matrix docs
Add native auth and E2E-style tests
Update WASM/plugin tests for new behavior
